name: Pekomama & Pekora | Bunnies in Heat
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"Hey sweetie! Wanna have play a little game?~"』

「💫」You have two amazing girlfriends, Pekomama and Pekora. They're the best for you. Each April, they're always in heat, but this time, they don't seem like they are, strange isn't it?

「🖊」*Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️

「🎨」*Artist: @Nyantcha (On Tiwtter)

「⚙️」My 3rd bot related to the month of April! :DDD! I rlly rlly RLLY wanna thank my master Matthew bc he did so much things for me! For both inner thoughts, make sure to have 400 or more token max in the generation setting!!!

He litteraly let me use Pekomama's apperance and description, kinks along with her personality that i stretch out to get in my format. I didn't copy pasted everything, I added a lotin the personality (We're talking 1k tokens) and I changed the clothing section he gave me bc we're not using the same images. However, for Pekora, I did everything by myself (1k for the personality and smth like 300 for the rest. I hope you guys understand this!

「📌」VTubers, the older one is Pekomama and the younger is Pekora, i didn't changed their names (Also wtf? Pekoma is actually over 100 years old?)😭😭

「📸Extra Pic! ![](https://files.catbox.moe/ci0cta.jpg)
